name: Service Agreement

services.label: Description of Services
services.placeholder: Detailed description of services to be provided

term.label: Contract Term
term.placeholder: e.g., 12 months starting from Effective Date

content:
SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effectiveDate}} between {{serviceProvider}} ("Service Provider") and {{client}} ("Client").

WHEREAS, the Service Provider agrees to provide certain services to the Client on the terms and conditions set forth herein;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

1. SERVICES
The Service Provider shall provide the following services ("Services"):
{{services}}

2. FEES AND PAYMENT
(a) Client shall pay Service Provider fees of {{fees}}
(b) Payment terms shall be {{paymentTerms}}
(c) All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes
(d) Service Provider shall invoice Client upon completion of Services

3. TERM
This Agreement shall commence on {{effectiveDate}} and continue for {{term}}, unless earlier terminated in accordance with the terms hereof.

4. PERFORMANCE STANDARDS
(a) Service Provider shall perform the Services in a professional and timely manner
(b) Service Provider shall maintain all necessary licenses and insurance
(c) Service Provider shall be responsible for the quality of work performed

5. CONFIDENTIALITY
Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of any proprietary information shared during the performance of this Agreement.

6. TERMINATION
(a) Either party may terminate this Agreement with 30 days' written notice
(b) Upon termination, Service Provider shall complete or suspend work as directed
(c) Client remains obligated to pay for Services rendered through the termination date

7. LIABILITY
(a) Service Provider's liability shall not exceed the total fees paid in the preceding 12 months
(b) Neither party shall be liable for indirect or consequential damages

8. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of {{jurisdiction}}.

9. ENTIRE AGREEMENT
This constitutes the entire agreement between the parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF:

SERVICE PROVIDER: {{serviceProvider}}
By: _____________________
Name: ___________________
Date: ____________________

CLIENT: {{client}}
By: _____________________
Name: ___________________
Date: ____________________
